headline: Bose thinks it can be a media company for some reason
summary: Bose is attempting to become a media company, launching its own record label. Historically, similar ventures by non-music companies have failed. Bose aims to defy this trend, comparing itself to Red Bull.

headline: Cold Court’s debut EP is an infectious, glitchy genre mashup
summary: Philly duo Cold Court released their debut EP, blending diverse influences into a 'messy soup.' Their sound superficially resembles hyperpop acts like 100 Gecs. The EP features tracks that playfully nod to pop-punk and emo genres.

headline: Polymarket reportedly paid people to post fake videos of themselves placing bets
summary: A WSJ investigation alleges Polymarket paid people to create fake betting videos. Over 1,100 deceptive clips were identified on social media. Creators confirmed being paid despite not disclosing it in their videos.

headline: How Roomba started a robot revolution
summary: Early Roombas were simple machines, bumping around until their battery died. Despite their basic functionality, robot vacuums captivated consumers. Roomba played a pivotal role in popularizing household robotics.

headline: Sesame Street Movie in the Works at Netflix Following Bidding War
summary: Netflix has secured rights for a new Sesame Street movie. The streaming giant won a bidding war against Universal Pictures. A new film featuring the beloved characters is now in development.

headline: The Best Deals Today: AirPods Pro 3, Tears of the Kingdom Switch 2 Edition, Nioh 3, and More
summary: Today's top deals include AirPods Pro 3 and a special Tears of the Kingdom Switch 2 Edition. Nioh 3 is also featured among the discounted items. Readers can find various tech and gaming product savings.

headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Listings Have Fans Fearing Pricey PlayStation Ports
summary: PlayStation fans are concerned about high prices for Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2. Microsoft listed the games at $40 each, excluding DLC. This pricing has sparked fears among the gaming community.

headline: Get a Brand New 77" Samsung 4K OLED Smart TV for Just $1,098 for Amazon Prime Day
summary: A 77" Samsung 4K OLED Smart TV is available for just $1,098. This deal is part of Amazon Prime Day promotions. It's highlighted as one of the best OLED TV offers currently available.

headline: Starmer considers political future as pressure to quit mounts
summary: Keir Starmer is reportedly considering his political future amid growing pressure to resign. US President Donald Trump publicly stated the PM will quit, adding to the blow. Speculation about his departure is intensifying.

headline: Signs grow that PM will resign with mood in government shifting
summary: Speculation is increasing that the Prime Minister will resign. The mood within the government is reportedly shifting. BBC reporters detail the growing likelihood of the PM's departure.

headline: Trump and Iran's negotiator trade warnings as talks held in Switzerland
summary: President Trump and Iran's negotiator exchanged warnings during talks in Switzerland. Trump threatened military action against Iran if it doesn't control Hezbollah. The US president was not physically present at the negotiations.

headline: Family of driver killed in Bedford train crash 'devastated' by loss
summary: The family of Shaun Burton, driver killed in a Bedford train crash, expressed their devastation. A union leader described his death as 'heartbreaking.' Investigations into the fatal incident are likely ongoing.
